FlowDefinition.description: Flow that sends Slack notifications to combined funnel owners when specific case types are created or updated. 04/12/2023 - Updated the flow to not ping when SaaS Activated and Billing is Opted Out and/or no ‘Billing Launch Date’ (Sprint 6 - 2023) 02/06/24 - Added action to notify user upon case ownership change. 02/09/2024 - PE - Deactivated flow as a new one with the same purpose was created.
